## Optimizer — Reproduction Checklist (Attention Is All You Need, §5.3)

| Field | Value (as used in the paper) |
|---|---|
| Optimizer | Adam [1] [2] |
| β₁ | `0.9` [1] |
| β₂ | `0.98` [1] |
| ε | `1e-9` [1] |

Sources
[1] Attention Is All You Need, 5.3 Optimizer, p. 7
[2] ADAM: A METHOD FOR STOCHASTIC OPTIMIZATION, ABSTRACT, p. 1
